description_long: This is a large, circular chandelier with a rustic, medieval-inspired design. The frame consists of two concentric wooden rings connected by black metal spokes, with each intersection supporting a candle-like light source. There are ten evenly spaced faux candles, each housed in a black metal holder, giving the appearance of traditional wax candles. The chandelier is suspended from the ceiling by three angled metal rods converging at a central point above the fixture. The materials and color palette evoke a vintage, industrial aesthetic, suitable for urban lofts or historic-themed public spaces. The overall construction appears robust, with a focus on both decorative and functional lighting.
description: A circular, rustic chandelier with ten candle-like lights on a wooden and metal frame, suspended by metal rods. The design features black metal holders and faux candles for a vintage, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular arrangement of ten candle-like lights and the converging suspension rods.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth of the candle holders and the spacing between the lights.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the symmetry of the frame and the even distribution of the candle lights.
description_view_3: View showing the alignment of the suspension rods and the robust construction of the metal and wood frame.
